narrowed.from: Classes (Record<string, string>) — inherited from StandardProps via JssProps
narrowed.reason: Migration plan v4 §2.3 strict-preservation: re-route the historical `classes` prop through Tailwind via the `withClasses` shim. Slot keys are explicit (root, label, icon) instead of the open-ended Record<string, string>. Consumer overrides with these key names continue to work; consumers passing other keys see a TS error at the call-site (silently no-op at runtime).
